block_03: The Football Cup Is Ending, the Trading Cup is About to Begin!⚽
block_11: We’re starting the long-awaited tournament dedicated to the Africa Cup of Nations 2022!
block_12: The trading cup will be taking place from Monday, February 7 until Wednesday, February 9. Top-15 traders on the leaderboard will share a guaranteed prize pool of $5,000.
